message: Thanks for the feedback! We are routing this to the appropriate team for follow-up. cc @dargilco @nick863 @trangevi

body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member best able to assist.

**Summary:** You are asking how to handle user consent/approval flows for tool usage in agents when using the `AIProjectClient` in the `Azure.AI.Projects` SDK (v2.0.0-beta.2). Specifically, you need the client-side equivalent of the approval prompt you see in the AI Foundry portal when an agent tries to use tools.

<details>
<summary>📋 Triage Details</summary>

**Labels Applied:**
- Category: `Client` — this is an Azure SDK client library question (not management/provisioning)
- Service: `AI Projects` — relates to `Azure.AI.Projects` SDK under `/sdk/ai/`

**Label Confidence:** High — the issue clearly identifies the `Azure.AI.Projects` package and is a usage/how-to question about the client SDK.

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Suggestions & Resources</summary>

While waiting for a team response, you may find these helpful:

- **README for Azure.AI.Projects.Agents**: [`sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Projects.Agents/README.md`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Projects.Agents/README.md) — the samples there use `PersistentAgent`; the `AIProjectClient` API may have a different path to tool approval.
- **Samples folder**: Check [`sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Projects/`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Projects) for any samples covering tool authorization flows.
- The tool consent/approval in AI Foundry portal typically corresponds to an **OAuth-based user consent flow**. In the SDK, this may require passing user-delegated credentials (e.g., `InteractiveBrowserCredential` or `AuthorizationCodeCredential`) rather than a service principal, so the token carries the user's consent context.

</details>
